meaning: adj.不忠的,背叛的,不忠诚的
examples: Accusing us of being disloyal to cover his own sorry behaviour is truly execrable.
She is disloyal to her husband.
Disloyal jerk that I was, I did nothing.
Nowadays Lim is more likely to be tagged formidable and legendary than disloyal and chauvinist.
But at least Rhodri has invented a soundbite that explains why this would not be disloyal.
